title: feat: allow timemachine-studio community models
author: voodoohop
pr_body_excerpt:
- Adds `timemachine-studio` (GitHub user ID `183505255`) to the community-model allowlist
- Adds a regression assertion for the immutable GitHub ID
- Validated with the focused community endpoint allowlist test

gist.headline: A new garden plot opens
gist.blurb: timemachine-studio has been added to the community-model garden. Their models can now bloom through the community endpoints, with a tiny regression fence around the GitHub ID.
gist.summary: Added GitHub user timemachine-studio (immutable ID 183505255) to the community-model endpoint allowlist, with a regression assertion to keep that access stable.
gist.impact: timemachine-studio can now make its community models available through Pollinations community endpoints, while the immutable-ID test protects the integration from username changes.
gist.visual_concept: Polly welcomes a new labeled seed packet, 'timemachine-studio,' into a shared code-garden beside a friendly retro community endpoint terminal. The visual metaphor is a newly approved garden plot with an ID-tagged plant, representing stable GitHub identity-based access.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of Polly, the cute yellow-and-brown striped bee mascot wearing a tiny gardener hat, planting a seed packet labeled 'timemachine-studio' in a lime green (#ecf874) code-garden while a friendly retro terminal displays an ID tag '183505255'. Small code-plants, flowers, and soft pastel mint-to-lavender gradients surround the shared garden; cozy pixel art, 8-bit aesthetic, soft pastel gradients, warm lighting, retro gaming vibes, emotionally warm.
